steps.title: Use the scale of the problem
steps.content: The passage says there are over 500,000 minor planets and that finding a unique name for each was already challenging. That scale explains why many recently discovered bodies receive only identification numbers.

steps.title: Reject mismatches
steps.content: B says feasible, the opposite of the passage's logic. C describes size or importance but not whether the naming task can be completed. D makes naming unnecessary rather than impractical. The remaining word means nearly impossible to overcome. The answer is A.
